summary: Completed frontend-only validation for landing-page redesign scope. Verified Family.co-style landing structure, role CTAs, how-it-works/fee/preview sections, desktop+mobile navigation usability, overflow checks, data-testid coverage, and non-landing route regression.
action_items: No blocking issues found in requested landing-only redesign scope.
Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/styles.css into smaller modules (currently >700 lines).
Align environment docs with repo state: /app/frontend/.env is currently absent, though testing guidance expects REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL there.
critical_code_review_comments: Maintainability concern: /app/frontend/styles.css exceeds 700 lines and should be modularized.
Config consistency concern: frontend .env file expected by process/testing guidance is missing from current workspace.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed browser automation on http://localhost:3000. Passed checks: landing redesign sections, merchant+affiliate hero CTAs, role journey blocks, 2% fee block, buyer preview block, desktop nav anchor links, desktop/mobile overflow=false, key data-testid coverage, and route regressions for /signup?role=merchant, /onboarding?role=merchant, /dashboard, /affiliate.
rca of the issue: No functional bug reproduced in this frontend-only iteration.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md: no credentials required for this frontend scope.
